sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './QuizResults.css'; const QuizResults = ({ results, onRetake }) => { const { score, careers, courses, field, fieldDescription, strengths, recommendations } = results; return (

🎉 Your Career Match Results

Based on your assessment, here are your personalized recommendations

{/* Score Section */}

Compatibility Score

{score}%
Match with {field}

{fieldDescription}

{/* Careers Section */}

Recommended Careers in {field}

{careers.map((career, index) => (

{career.name}

{career.description}

Salary Range: {career.salary}
Demand: {career.demand}
{career.skills.map((skill, skillIndex) => ( {skill} ))}
))}
{/* Strengths Section */} {strengths && strengths.length > 0 && (

Your Key Strengths

{strengths.map((strength, index) => (
✅
{strength}
))}
)} {/* Courses Section */}

Recommended Learning Path

Develop your skills with these curated courses

{courses.map((course, index) => (

{course.name}

{course.platform}
⏱️ {course.duration} 📊 {course.level}
Skills you'll learn:
{course.skills.map((skill, skillIndex) => ( {skill} ))}
View Course on {course.platform}
))}
{/* Recommendations */} {recommendations && (

Career Guidance

💡
{recommendations}
)} {/* Actions */}
💾 Save to Profile

Note: Your quiz results have been automatically saved to your profile. You can review them anytime in your profile section.

); }; export default QuizResults;
